usage_notes.description: This JSON contains structured curriculum data for Grade 7 maths. Use this context to generate relevant questions aligned with the textbook.
usage_notes.ai_guidance: When generating questions, match the terminology, difficulty, and problem styles described in each topic. Use common_mistakes to create distractors for multiple choice questions.

topics.name: 1.1 Divisibility tests
learning_objectives: Understand and apply divisibility rules for 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9, 10
Test large numbers using divisibility rules
topics.question_style_notes: Use numbers up to 4 digits. Focus on applying rules rather than memorization.

topics.name: 1.2 Lowest common multiple and highest common factor
learning_objectives: Find the LCM of two numbers by listing or using prime factors
Find the HCF of two numbers by listing factors or using prime factorization
topics.question_style_notes: Use numbers up to 100. Include real-life contexts like scheduling events or grouping items.

topics.name: 2.1 Congruency

prerequisite_skills: Understanding of related concepts from previous chapters
